utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, and total_budget. In the final coverage plan, all 5 of these items appear. Each one includes provider, coverage description, and cost details, fulfilling the requirement of being 'fully specified according to what should be covered under each item with all details.' Therefore, all 5 required items are present and complete.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan includes four LifeFirst-based components: (1) Health coverage combining physical and mental health — this corresponds to 'LifeFirst Standard Plan' under both 'primary_health_coverage.physical_health' and 'primary_health_coverage.mental_health', both rated 9. (2) Property coverage from LifeFirst — this matches 'LifeFirst Standard Coverage' under 'property_protection.home_content', rated 9. (3) Travel coverage from LifeFirst — corresponds to 'LifeFirst Standard Plan' under 'mobility_coverage.travel_insurance', rated 9. (4) Additional services include gym membership reimbursement, wellness programs, premium membership, and dedicated advisor support. From the ground truth, 'Gym Membership Reimbursement' has rating 4, 'Wellness Programs' rating 3, and 'Premium Insurance Membership' (for premium membership + advisor support) rating 6. Thus, we map all these elements to their respective ratings.
